chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 802 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case. 1.For orders on office objection ‘A’ 2.For orders on M.A No.4435/2025 (E/A) 3.For orders on M.A No.4436/2025 (S/A) 4. For Hearing of main case. 22.10.2025. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing when matter was adjourned with intimation notice to the petitioner and his counsel. Dismissed for non prosecution. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
